bias.analyst: The bottoming sequence is completing: after the trap, the absorption and the reclaim, buyers are now CUTTING THE LINE - stacking large orders in front of the great floor instead of waiting at it. That impatience is the strongest accumulation signal on the book. Price has climbed back above the session's volume anchor and momentum is one tick from clearing its gate. The half-hour classification lands next tick; a confirmed push through the first resistance on real volume would be the with-trend long Theo has waited for.
bias.commentator: Listen to this crowd! After the wall's heroic stand, the home fans aren't even waiting at the goal line anymore - they're SURGING up the pitch ahead of their own defense! The away side is backpedaling, our side has crossed midfield on a counter, and the referee is about to blow the half-hour whistle that sets the game plan. One more clean break upfield and the manager sends the strikers on. The momentum has FLIPPED, folks!

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.

events.analyst: Market open. Theo watches the first 30 minutes before committing - the [indicator] decides which playbook is valid today.
events.commentator: KICKOFF! The bell rings and we're underway. Theo holds its shape for the first half hour - no wild lunges before the game shows its pattern.
